# Upstream release tags that are already triaged for this standalone repository.
#
# Accepted formats (exact-match only):
#   1) <tag>
#   2) <owner/repo>@<tag>
#   3) <base>..<head>
#   4) <owner/repo>@<base>..<head>
#
# Notes:
# - Blank lines and lines starting with '#' are ignored.
# - Matching is strict literal. Bare entries (formats 1 and 3) apply ONLY to the default upstream repo (droserasprout/io.drsr.hotspotadb).
# - Use tuple format (formats 2 and 4) when monitoring overridden upstream repos.
# - Remove an entry to allow future issue generation for that tag.

# Baseline at standalone cutover:
v1.0.0

# Selectively integrated in cbkii/hotspotadb 2.3.0:
droserasprout/io.drsr.hotspotadb@1.1.0..1.2.0
